title: Ability to share Kanban View of a board
excerpt: I would like to share the Kanban view of my board with team members via the share option:

posts.author: meghanCapiaghi (Meghan Capiaghi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to share the Kanban view of my board with team members via the share option:

Screen Shot 2022-05-26 at 9.30.55 AM1926×1116 221 KB

posts.author: areedktgy (Alex Reed)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a great feature to create a public roadmap that can be shared with anyone with the access link! It’s really limiting that this view type can’t currently be shared.

posts.author: lrenner (Lillian Renner)
posts.cookedHtml: Also the ability to hide empty columns.

posts.author: brieyost (Brie)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also looking for the capability to share Kanban view with outside partners and I would also like to hide columns I don’t want to show in that view.

posts.author: linhtran (Linh Tran)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a powerful feature, can we please allow sharing a kanban view? I would like to do that and embed it into pages that can be viewed by my team. This is a very powerful view and not allow sharing it takes a way its power. Other views are nice but not as Kanban. For example a roadmap view by quarter in kanban view is much cleaner view to share than the main view.

posts.author: dmanak (Dallas Manaker)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love the ability to share Kanban boards. This could help with simple roadmap sharing.

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi folks,

Our app Multi Board Kanban now supports allows view only users , this means you can share it with a wider audience without affecting your billing

image1624×756 92.2 KB

PS: I understand this still not as convenient as sharing a link, but from a billing perspective it helps to not pay more for only seeing the view
